chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Legal Punishment for Slanderous Accusation

text: 5065 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ قَالَ: "إِنَّ اَلْعُذْرَةَ قَدْ تَسْقُطُ مِنْ غَيْرِ جِمَاعٍ قَدْ تَذْهَبُ بِالنَّكْبَةِ وَ اَلْعَثْرَةِ وَ اَلسَّقْطَةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5065 - In another narration, Imam (as) said: "Indeed, the hymen may be lost without intercourse; it can be lost due to injury, stumbling, or falling."
